sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 78:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 78:1
items.html: It begins from Tabur of the inner AK because there is the place of the descent of the screen incorporated in the bottom Hey, extending from below upward to the Chazeh. (Inner Light, Item 14)
